allowListed.rationale: A cluster's instance-collection type is fixed at create (instance groups XOR instance fleets), so a single cost-bounded EMR cluster cannot exercise both InstanceGroupConfig and InstanceFleetConfig. The emr-instance-configs integ covers InstanceGroupConfig (the CDK-default group-based case); InstanceFleetConfig is structurally identical (same AddInstanceFleet create-poll / no-standalone-delete / best-effort-scale-to-0-for-TASK design, different API) and is covered by unit tests. Add a fleet-based integ if a real-AWS fleet-specific bug surfaces.
drift coverage only; Connection is a passive config object, no real-AWS lifecycle to exercise.
immutable type (every property change replaces); unit roundtrip suffices. Add integ if a Lambda EFO consumer pattern bug surfaces.

rds-aurora integ does not currently provision DBProxy + TargetGroup + Endpoint (cost + 5-15 min create/delete). Unit roundtrip covers the diff matrix; extend rds-aurora when a real-AWS Proxy lifecycle bug warrants the integ time.
see DBProxy above — same rds-aurora-extend reasoning.
